lesson.subtitle: Aula 10 -- Review + Confidence Check -- Lessons 6-9
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Karina Macedo | Aula 10 -- Review + Confidence Check (Lessons 6-9)

listenings.text: Hello Robert, this is Karina. Thank you for your email. Can we schedule a meeting next week? I am available on Tuesday at ten. I am going to visit your city soon, and I am going to bring information about my aircraft. It is modern and very safe, and it has a powerful engine. I hope to see you soon. Please reply to confirm the day. Thank you very much.

Hi Karina, this is Robert. Yes, Tuesday at ten is good for me. Let me tell you how to get to my office. Take a taxi at your hotel. The address is fifty Market Street. Go straight for ten minutes, then turn left at the corner. My office is on the right, next to a coffee shop. It is not far. I will prepare everything for our meeting. See you soon.

extra_audio.text: First, Karina sent an email to schedule a meeting with Robert. Then they confirmed the day and time on the calendar. Next, Karina took a taxi from the airport to the office. After that, she described her aircraft to Robert. Finally, they talked about their plans for the future.
